subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that through His bounty, mercy and infinite loving-kindness, thou hast turned thy face toward the Most Exalted Horizon and from the hands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فضل و رحمت و عنایت نامتناهیه الهی بافق اعلی توجه نمودی و از ایادی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @mystical themes
